zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie於1425年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾阿瑟利時，他的父親Walter Stewart Master of Fife31歲，母親Janet Erskine20歲。他和Elizabeth Arnot至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1488年在蘇格蘭享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie于1425年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾阿瑟利时，他的父亲Walter Stewart Master of Fife31岁，母亲Janet Erskine20岁。他和Elizabeth Arnot至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1488年在苏格兰享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie was born in 1425, in Arthurlie, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Walter Stewart Master of Fife, was 31 and his mother, Janet Erskine, was 20. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Elizabeth Arnot. He died in 1488, in Scotland, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie est né en 1425, à Arthurlie, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Walter Stewart Master of Fife, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Janet Erskine, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Elizabeth Arnot. Il est décédé en 1488, à Écosse, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie 1425 in Arthurlie, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Stewart Master of Fife 31 und seine Mutter Janet Erskine 20. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Arnot mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1488 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie è nato il nel 1425 nel Arthurlie, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Walter Stewart Master of Fife, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Janet Erskine, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Elizabeth Arnot. Morì nel 1488, nel Scotland, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphieが1425年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアアルサーリーで生まれた時，父Walter Stewart Master of Fifeは31歳，母Janet Erskineは20歳であった。彼はElizabeth Arnotとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1488年にスコットランドで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie(이)가 1425년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 아스를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Stewart Master of Fife(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Erskine(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Arnot(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1488년 스컷랜드에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie nasceu em 1425, em Arthurlie, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Walter Stewart Master of Fife, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Janet Erskine, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Elizabeth Arnot. Ele faleceu em 1488, em Scotland, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie родился в 1425 г. в местности артурли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Walter Stewart Master of Fife было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Janet Erskine, 20. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Elizabeth Arnot. Он умер в 1488 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walter Stewart First of Morphie nació en 1425, en Arthurlie, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Walter Stewart Master of Fife, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Janet Erskine, tenía 20 años.
